00041 /******************************************************************************
00042  * Helper functions and macros                                                *
00043  ******************************************************************************/
00044 
00048 #define SAVE_STATE \
00049     do { \
00050         thread->sp = sp; \
00051         thread->pc = pc; \
00052         thread->fp = fp; \
00053     } while (0)
00054 
00055 /******************************************************************************
00056  * Interpreter implementation                                                 *
00057  ******************************************************************************/
00058 
00063 static void prepare_for_call(thread_t *thread, method_t *method)
00064 {
00065     stack_frame_t *fp;
00066 
00067     // Check if we are not overflowing the stack
00068     if ((thread->sp + method->max_locals + method->max_stack)
00069         > (jword_t *) (thread->fp - 2))
00070     {
00071         c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
00072                 "Stack overflow, try using a larger stack with the --stack-size"
00073                 " parameter");
00074     }
00075 
00076     // Prepare the first, fake stack-frame
00077     fp = thread->fp - 1;
00078     fp->cl = NULL;
00079     fp->method = &halt_method;
00080     fp->pc = halt_method.code + 2;
00081     fp->locals = thread->sp;
00082 
00083     // Prepare the real first stack frame
00084     fp = thread->fp - 2;
00085     fp->cl = cp_get_class(method->cp);
00086     fp->method = method;
00087     fp->pc = method->code;
00088     fp->locals = thread->sp;
00089 
00090     // Prepare the thread state
00091     thread->sp += method->max_locals;
00092     thread->fp -= 2;
00093 } // prepare_for_call()
00094 
00098 void interpreter(method_t *main_method)
00099 {
00100     // Runtime state
00101     const uint8_t *pc; // Program counter
00102     jword_t *sp; // Stack-pointer
00103     stack_frame_t *fp; // Current frame-pointer
00104     jword_t *locals; // Local variables pointer
00105     jword_t *cp; // Current constant-pool
00106     thread_t *thread; // The executing thread
00107 
00108     // Cached globals
00109 #if JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00110     static const void *dispatch[256] = {
00111         &&NOP_label,
00112         &&ACONST_NULL_label,

00517 
00518     // Set the runtime state from the main method
00519     thread = thread_self();
00520     prepare_for_call(thread, main_method);
00521     pc = main_method->code;
00522     sp = thread->sp;
00523     fp = (stack_frame_t *) thread->fp;
00524     locals = fp->locals;
00525     cp = main_method->cp->data;
00526 
00527     print_method_call(thread, main_method);
00528 
00529     INTERPRETER_PROLOG
00530 
00531     OPCODE(NOP)
00532         pc++;
00533         DISPATCH;
00534 
00535     OPCODE(ACONST_NULL)
00536         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = JNULL;
00537         sp++;
00538         pc++;
00539         DISPATCH;
00540 
00541     OPCODE(ICONST_M1)
00542         *((int32_t *) sp) = -1;
00543         sp++;
00544         pc++;
00545         DISPATCH;
00546 
00547     OPCODE(ICONST_0)
00548         *((int32_t *) sp) = 0;
00549         sp++;
00550         pc++;
00551         DISPATCH;
00552 
00553     OPCODE(ICONST_1)
00554         *((int32_t *) sp) = 1;
00555         sp++;
00556         pc++;
00557         DISPATCH;
00558 
00559     OPCODE(ICONST_2)
00560         *((int32_t *) sp) = 2;
00561         sp++;
00562         pc++;
00563         DISPATCH;
00564 
00565     OPCODE(ICONST_3)
00566         *((int32_t *) sp) = 3;
00567         sp++;
00568         pc++;
00569         DISPATCH;
00570 
00571     OPCODE(ICONST_4)
00572         *((int32_t *) sp) = 4;
00573         sp++;
00574         pc++;
00575         DISPATCH;
00576 
00577     OPCODE(ICONST_5)
00578         *((int32_t *) sp) = 5;
00579         sp++;
00580         pc++;
00581         DISPATCH;
00582 
00583     OPCODE(LCONST_0)
00584         *((int64_t *) sp) = (int64_t) 0;
00585         sp += 2;
00586         pc++;
00587         DISPATCH;
00588 
00589     OPCODE(LCONST_1)
00590         *((int64_t *) sp) = (int64_t) 1;
00591         sp += 2;
00592         pc++;
00593         DISPATCH;
00594 
00595 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00596 
00597     OPCODE(FCONST_0)
00598         *((float *) sp) = 0.0f;
00599         sp++;
00600         pc++;
00601         DISPATCH;
00602 
00603     OPCODE(FCONST_1)
00604         *((float *) sp) = 1.0f;
00605         sp++;
00606         pc++;
00607         DISPATCH;
00608 
00609     OPCODE(FCONST_2)
00610         *((float *) sp) = 2.0f;
00611         sp++;
00612         pc++;
00613         DISPATCH;
00614 
00615     OPCODE(DCONST_0)
00616         *((double *) sp) = 0.0;
00617         sp += 2;
00618         pc++;
00619         DISPATCH;
00620 
00621     OPCODE(DCONST_1)
00622         *((double *) sp) = 1.0;
00623         sp += 2;
00624         pc++;
00625         DISPATCH;
00626 
00627 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00628 
00629     OPCODE(BIPUSH)
00630         *((int32_t *) sp) = (int32_t) *((int8_t *) (pc + 1));
00631         sp++;
00632         pc += 2;
00633         DISPATCH;
00634 
00635     OPCODE(SIPUSH)
00636         *((int32_t *) sp) = (int32_t) load_int16_un(pc + 1);
00637         sp++;
00638         pc += 3;
00639         DISPATCH;
00640 
00641     OPCODE(LDC)
00642         *((int32_t *) sp) = cp_data_get_int32(cp, *(pc + 1));
00643         sp++;
00644         pc += 2;
00645         DISPATCH;
00646 
00647     OPCODE(LDC_W)
00648         *((int32_t *) sp) = cp_data_get_int32(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00649         sp++;
00650         pc += 3;
00651         DISPATCH;
00652 
00653     OPCODE(LDC2_W)
00654         *((int64_t *) sp) = cp_data_get_int64(cp, load_uint16_un(pc + 1));
00655         sp += 2;
00656         pc += 3;
00657         DISPATCH;
00658 
00659     OPCODE(ILOAD)
00660         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int32_t *) (locals + *(pc + 1)));
00661         sp++;
00662         pc += 2;
00663         DISPATCH;
00664 
00665     OPCODE(LLOAD)
00666         *((int64_t *) sp) = *((int64_t *) (locals + *(pc + 1)));
00667         sp += 2;
00668         pc += 2;
00669         DISPATCH;
00670 
00671 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00672 
00673     OPCODE(FLOAD)
00674         *((float *) sp) = *((float *) (locals + *(pc + 1)));
00675         sp++;
00676         pc += 2;
00677         DISPATCH;
00678 
00679     OPCODE(DLOAD)
00680         *((double *) sp) = *((double *) (locals + *(pc + 1)));
00681         sp += 2;
00682         pc += 2;
00683         DISPATCH;
00684 
00685 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00686 
00687     OPCODE(ALOAD)
00688         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = *((uintptr_t *) (locals + *(pc + 1)));
00689         sp++;
00690         pc += 2;
00691         DISPATCH;
00692 
00693     OPCODE(ILOAD_0)
00694         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int32_t *) locals);
00695         sp++;
00696         pc++;
00697         DISPATCH;
00698 
00699     OPCODE(ILOAD_1)
00700         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int32_t *) (locals + 1));
00701         sp++;
00702         pc++;
00703         DISPATCH;
00704 
00705     OPCODE(ILOAD_2)
00706         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int32_t *) (locals + 2));
00707         sp++;
00708         pc++;

00811     OPCODE(ALOAD_3)

00816 
00817     /*
00818      * Array indices should be a signed 32-bit integers but arrays of
00819      * negative length are not allowed so we treat negative numbers
00820      * as large unsigned integers which will fail the index check
00821      * anyway
00822      */
00823 
00824     OPCODE(IALOAD) {
00825         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00826         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00827         int32_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00828 
00829         if (array == NULL) {
00830             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00831         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00832             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00833         }
00834 
00835         *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) = *(data + index);
00836         sp--;
00837         pc++;
00838         DISPATCH;
00839     }
00840 
00841     OPCODE(LALOAD) {
00842         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00843         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00844         int64_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00845 
00846         if (array == NULL) {
00847             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00848         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00849             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00850         }
00851 
00852         *((int64_t *) (sp - 2)) = *(data + index);
00853         pc++;
00854         DISPATCH;
00855     }
00856 
00857 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00858 
00859     OPCODE(FALOAD) {
00860         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00861         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00862         float *data = array_get_data(array);
00863 
00864         if (array == NULL) {
00865             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00866         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00867             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00868         }
00869 
00870         *((float *) (sp - 2)) = *(data + index);
00871         sp--;
00872         pc++;
00873         DISPATCH;
00874     }
00875

00878         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00879         double *data = array_get_data(array);
00880 
00881         if (array == NULL) {
00882             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00883         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00884             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00885         }
00886 
00887         *((double *) (sp - 2)) = *(data + index);
00888         pc++;
00889         DISPATCH;
00890     }

00892 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT

00894     OPCODE(AALOAD) {
00895         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00896         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00897         uintptr_t *data = array_ref_get_data(array);
00898 
00899         if (array == NULL) {
00900             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00901         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00902             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00903         }
00904 
00905         // Reference arrays grow backwards!
00906         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2)) = *(data - index);
00907         sp--;
00908         pc++;
00909         DISPATCH;
00910     }
00911 
00912     OPCODE(BALOAD) {
00913         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00914         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00915         int8_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00916 
00917         if (array == NULL) {
00918             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00919         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00920             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00921         }
00922 
00923         if (header_get_class(&(array->header))->elem_type == PT_BYTE) {
00924             *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2)) = *(data + index);
00925         } else {
00926             *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2)) = (*(data + (index >> 3)) >> (index & 0x7))
00927                                        & 0x1;
00928         }
00929 
00930         sp--;
00931         pc++;
00932         DISPATCH;
00933     }
00934 
00935     OPCODE(CALOAD) {
00936         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00937         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00938         uint16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00939 
00940         if (array == NULL) {
00941             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00942         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00943             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00944         }
00945 
00946         *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2)) = *(data + index);
00947         sp--;
00948         pc++;
00949         DISPATCH;
00950     }
00951 
00952     OPCODE(SALOAD) {
00953         uint32_t index =  *((uint32_t *) (sp - 1));
00954         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
00955         int16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
00956 
00957         if (array == NULL) {
00958             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
00959         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
00960             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
00961         }
00962 
00963         *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) = (int32_t) *(data + index);
00964         sp--;
00965         pc++;
00966         DISPATCH;
00967     }
00968 
00969     OPCODE(ISTORE) {
00970         uint8_t index = *(pc + 1);

00974         pc += 2;
00975         DISPATCH;
00976     }

01164 
01165         if (array == NULL) {
01166             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
01167         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
01168             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
01169         }

01199         double *data = array_get_data(array);
01200

01203         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {

01208         sp -= 4;

01215     OPCODE(AASTORE) {
01216         class_t *src;
01217         class_t *dest;
01218         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 3));
01219         uintptr_t *data = array_ref_get_data(array);
01220         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2));
01221         uintptr_t value;
01222 
01223         if (array == NULL) {
01224             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
01225         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
01226             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
01227         }
01228 
01229         value = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
01230 
01231         if (value == JNULL) {
01232             *(data - index) = JNULL;
01233         } else {
01234             header_t *header = (header_t *) value;
01235 
01236             src = header_get_class(header);
01237             dest = header_get_class(&(array->header))->elem_class;
01238 
01239             if ((src == dest) || bcl_is_assignable(src, dest)) {
01240                 *(data - index) = value;
01241             } else {
01242                 goto throw_arraystoreexception;
01243             }
01244         }
01245 
01246         sp -= 3;
01247         pc++;
01248         DISPATCH;
01249     }
01250 
01251     OPCODE(BASTORE)
01252     {
01253         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2));
01254         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 3));
01255         uint8_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01256 
01257         if (array == NULL) {
01258             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
01259         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
01260             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
01261         }
01262 
01263         if (header_get_class(&(array->header))->elem_type == PT_BYTE) {
01264             *(data + index) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
01265         } else {
01266             uint32_t value = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) & 0x1;
01267             uint32_t nvalue = value ^ 0x1;
01268 
01269             *(data + (index >> 3)) |= (value << (index & 0x7));
01270             *(data + (index >> 3)) &= ~(nvalue << (index & 0x7));
01271         }
01272 
01273         sp -= 3;
01274         pc++;
01275         DISPATCH;
01276     }
01277 
01278     OPCODE(CASTORE) {
01279         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2));
01280         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 3));
01281         uint16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01282 
01283         if (array == NULL) {
01284             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
01285         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
01286             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
01287         }
01288 
01289         *(data + index) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
01290         sp -= 3;
01291         pc++;
01292         DISPATCH;
01293     }
01294 
01295     OPCODE(SASTORE) {
01296         uint32_t index = *((uint32_t *) (sp - 2));
01297         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 3));
01298         uint16_t *data = array_get_data(array);
01299 
01300         if (array == NULL) {
01301             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
01302         } else if (index >= array_length(array)) {
01303             goto throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception;
01304         }
01305 
01306         *(data + index) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
01307         sp -= 3;
01308         pc++;
01309         DISPATCH;
01310     }
01311 
01312     OPCODE(POP)
01313         sp--;
01314         pc++;
01315         DISPATCH;
01316 
01317     OPCODE(POP2)
01318         sp -= 2;
01319         pc++;
01320         DISPATCH;
01321 
01322     OPCODE(DUP)
01323         *sp = *(sp - 1);
01324         sp++;
01325         pc++;
01326         DISPATCH;
01327 
01328 
01329     OPCODE(DUP_X1)
01330         *sp = *(sp - 1);
01331         *(sp - 1) = *(sp - 2);
01332         *(sp - 2) = *sp;
01333         sp++;
01334         pc++;
01335         DISPATCH;
01336 
01337 
01338     OPCODE(DUP_X2)
01339         *sp = *(sp - 1);
01340         *(sp - 1) = *(sp - 2);
01341         *(sp - 2) = *(sp - 3);
01342         *(sp - 3) = *sp;
01343         sp++;
01344         pc++;
01345         DISPATCH;
01346 
01347     OPCODE(DUP2)
01348         *(sp + 1) = *(sp - 1);
01349         *sp = *(sp - 2);
01350         sp += 2;
01351         pc++;
01352         DISPATCH;
01353 
01354     OPCODE(DUP2_X1)
01355         *(sp + 1) = *(sp - 1);
01356         *sp = *(sp - 2);
01357         *(sp - 1) = *(sp - 3);
01358         *(sp - 2) = *(sp + 1);
01359         *(sp - 3) = *sp;
01360         sp += 2;
01361         pc++;
01362         DISPATCH;
01363 
01364     OPCODE(DUP2_X2)
01365         *(sp + 1) = *(sp - 1);
01366         *sp = *(sp - 2);
01367         *(sp - 1) = *(sp - 3);
01368         *(sp - 2) = *(sp - 4);
01369         *(sp - 3) = *(sp + 1);
01370         *(sp - 4) = *sp;
01371         sp += 2;
01372         pc++;
01373         DISPATCH;
01374 
01375     OPCODE(SWAP) {
01376         jword_t temp = *(sp - 1);
01377 
01378         *(sp - 1) = *(sp - 2);
01379         *(sp - 2) = temp;
01380         pc++;
01381         DISPATCH;
01382     }
01383 
01384     OPCODE(IADD)
01385         *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) += *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
01386         sp--;
01387         pc++;
01388         DISPATCH;
01389 
01390     OPCODE(LADD)
01391         *((int64_t *) (sp - 4)) += *((int64_t *) (sp - 2));
01392         sp -= 2;
01393         pc++;
01394         DISPATCH;
01395 
01396 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
01397 
01398     OPCODE(FADD)
01399         *((float *) (sp - 2)) += *((float *) (sp - 1));
01400         sp--;
01401         pc++;
01402         DISPATCH;
01403 
01404     OPCODE(DADD)
01405         *((double *) (sp - 4)) += *((double *) (sp - 2));
01406         sp -= 2;
01407         pc++;
01408         DISPATCH;
01409 
01410 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT

01412     OPCODE(ISUB)

01476             *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) = value1;
01477         } else {

01780     OPCODE(LCMP) {

01784 
01785         /* HACK: This is a strict-aliasing violation but it should pose no
01786          * problem for the value to be written depends on the aliasing load */
01787         *((int32_t *) (sp - 4)) = (t == 0) ? 0 : ((t >> 63) | 1);

01795     OPCODE(FCMPL) {

01799         /* HACK: This is a strict-aliasing violation but it should pose no
01800          * problem for the value to be written depends on the aliasing load */
01801         if (value1 != value1 || value2 != value2) {
01802             *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) = -1;

01804             *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) = 0;
01805         } else if (value1 > value2) {
01806             *((int32_t *) (sp - 2)) = 1;

02022     OPCODE(LDC_REF) {
02023         uint8_t index = *(pc + 1);
02024 
02025         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = cp_data_get_uintptr(cp, index);
02026         sp++;
02027         pc += 2;
02028         DISPATCH;
02029     }
02030 
02031     OPCODE(LDC_W_REF) {
02032         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02033 
02034         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = cp_data_get_uintptr(cp, index);
02035         sp++;
02036         pc += 3;
02037         DISPATCH;
02038     }
02039 
02040     OPCODE(TABLESWITCH) {
02041         int32_t *aligned_ptr = (int32_t *) size_ceil((uintptr_t) pc + 1, 4);
02042         int32_t default_offset = aligned_ptr[0];
02043         int32_t low = aligned_ptr[1];
02044         int32_t high = aligned_ptr[2];
02045         int32_t index = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02046 
02047         aligned_ptr += 3;
02048         sp--;
02049 
02050         if (index < low || index > high) {
02051             pc += default_offset;
02052             DISPATCH;
02053         } else {
02054             pc += aligned_ptr[index - low];
02055             DISPATCH;
02056         }
02057     }
02058 
02059     OPCODE(LOOKUPSWITCH) {
02060         int32_t *aligned_ptr = (int32_t *) size_ceil((uintptr_t) pc + 1, 4);
02061         int32_t default_offset = aligned_ptr[0];
02062         int32_t n_pairs = aligned_ptr[1];
02063         int32_t key = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02064         int32_t i;
02065 
02066         aligned_ptr += 2;
02067         sp--;
02068 
02069         for (i = 0; i < n_pairs; i++) {
02070             if (key == aligned_ptr[i * 2]) {
02071                 break;
02072             }
02073         }
02074 
02075         pc += (i == n_pairs) ? default_offset : aligned_ptr[(i * 2) + 1];
02076         DISPATCH;
02077     }
02078 
02079     OPCODE(IRETURN) {
02080         int32_t ret_value = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)); // Pop the return value
02081 
02082         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
02083 
02084         // Pop the current frame
02085         sp = locals + 1;
02086         fp++;
02087         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02088         pc = fp->pc;
02089         locals = fp->locals;
02090 
02091         // Push the return value on the stack
02092         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = ret_value;
02093         DISPATCH;
02094     }
02095 
02096     OPCODE(LRETURN) {
02097         int64_t ret_value = *((int64_t *) (sp - 2)); // Pop the return value
02098 
02099         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
02100 
02101         // Pop the current frame
02102         sp = locals + 2;
02103         fp++;
02104         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02105         pc = fp->pc;
02106         locals = fp->locals;
02107 
02108         // Push the return value on the stack
02109         *((int64_t *) (sp - 2)) = ret_value;
02110         DISPATCH;
02111     }
02112 
02113 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02114 
02115     OPCODE(FRETURN) {
02116         float ret_value = *((float *) (sp - 1)); // Pop the return value
02117 
02118         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
02119 
02120         // Pop the current frame
02121         sp = locals + 1;
02122         fp++;
02123         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02124         pc = fp->pc;
02125         locals = fp->locals;
02126 
02127         // Push the return value on the stack
02128         *((float *) (sp - 1)) = ret_value;
02129         DISPATCH;
02130     }
02131 
02132     OPCODE(DRETURN) {
02133         double ret_value = *((double *) (sp - 2)); // Pop the return value
02134 
02135         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
02136 
02137         // Pop the current frame
02138         sp = locals + 2;
02139         fp++;
02140         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02141         pc = fp->pc;
02142         locals = fp->locals;
02143 
02144        // Push the return value on the stack
02145         *((double *) (sp - 2)) = ret_value;
02146         DISPATCH;
02147     }
02148 
02149 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02150 
02151     OPCODE(ARETURN) {
02152         // Pop the return value
02153         uintptr_t ret_value = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02154 
02155         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
02156 
02157         // Pop the current frame
02158         sp = locals + 1;
02159         fp++;
02160         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02161         pc = fp->pc;
02162         locals = fp->locals;
02163 
02164         // Push the return value on the stack
02165         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1)) = ret_value;
02166         DISPATCH;
02167     }
02168 
02169     OPCODE(RETURN) {
02170         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
02171 
02172         // Pop the current frame
02173         sp = locals;
02174         fp++;
02175         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02176         pc = fp->pc;
02177         locals = fp->locals;
02178         DISPATCH;
02179     }
02180 
02181     OPCODE(INVOKEVIRTUAL) {
02182         uint16_t offset, index;
02183         uintptr_t ref;
02184         class_t *new_cl;
02185         method_t *new_method;
02186 
02187         index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02188         offset = method_unpack_arguments(index);
02189         index = method_unpack_index(index);
02190         locals = sp - offset;
02191         ref = *((uintptr_t *) locals);
02192 
02193         if (ref == JNULL) {
02194             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02195         }
02196 
02197         /* Fetch the new class from the obejct on top of the stack and the new
02198          * method from the class' dispatch table */
02199         new_cl = header_get_class((header_t *) ref);
02200         new_method = new_cl->dtable[index];
02201 
02202         print_method_call(thread, new_method);
02203 
02204         // Check if we are not overflowing the stack
02205         if ((locals + new_method->max_locals + new_method->max_stack)
02206             > (jword_t *) (fp - 1))
02207         {
02208             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
02209                     "Stack overflow, try using a larger stack with the "
02210                     "--stack-size parameter");
02211         }
02212 
02213         // Push a new stack frame
02214         fp->pc = pc + 3;
02215         fp--;
02216         fp->cl = new_cl;
02217         fp->method = new_method;
02218         fp->locals = locals;
02219 
02220         // Install the new state in the local variables
02221         cp = new_method->cp->data;
02222         sp = locals + new_method->max_locals;
02223         pc = new_method->code;
02224         DISPATCH;
02225     }
02226 
02227     OPCODE(INVOKESPECIAL) {
02228         uint16_t offset;
02229         uint16_t index;
02230         uintptr_t ref;
02231         method_t *new_method;
02232 
02233         index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02234         new_method = (method_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
02235         offset = new_method->args_size;
02236         locals = sp - offset;
02237         ref = *((uintptr_t *) locals);
02238 
02239         if (ref == JNULL) {
02240             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02241         }
02242 
02243         print_method_call(thread, new_method);
02244 
02245         // Check if we are not overflowing the stack
02246         if ((locals + new_method->max_locals + new_method->max_stack)
02247             > (jword_t *) (fp - 1))
02248         {
02249             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
02250                     "Stack overflow, try using a larger stack with the "
02251                     "--stack-size parameter\n");
02252         }
02253 
02254         // Push a new stack frame
02255         fp->pc = pc + 3;
02256         fp--;
02257         fp->cl = cp_get_class(new_method->cp);
02258         fp->method = new_method;
02259         fp->locals = locals;
02260 
02261         // Install the new state in the local variables
02262         cp = new_method->cp->data;
02263         sp = locals + new_method->max_locals;
02264         pc = new_method->code;
02265         DISPATCH;
02266     }
02267 
02268     OPCODE(INVOKESTATIC) {
02269         uint16_t offset, index;
02270         method_t *new_method;
02271 
02272         index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02273         new_method = (method_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
02274         offset = new_method->args_size;
02275         locals = sp - offset;
02276 
02277         print_method_call(thread, new_method);
02278 
02279         // Check if we are not overflowing the stack
02280         if ((locals + new_method->max_locals + new_method->max_stack)
02281             > (jword_t *) (fp - 1))
02282         {
02283             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
02284                     "Stack overflow, try using a larger stack with the "
02285                     "--stack-size parameter");
02286         }
02287 
02288         // Push a new stack frame
02289         fp->pc = pc + 3;
02290         fp--;
02291         fp->cl = cp_get_class(new_method->cp);
02292         fp->method = new_method;
02293         fp->locals = locals;
02294 
02295         // Install the new state in the local variables
02296         cp = new_method->cp->data;
02297         sp = locals + new_method->max_locals;
02298         pc = new_method->code;
02299         DISPATCH;
02300     }
02301 
02302     OPCODE(INVOKEINTERFACE) {
02303         uint16_t offset, index, match;
02304         uint32_t low, high, mid;
02305         uintptr_t ref;
02306         class_t *new_cl;
02307         method_t *new_method = NULL;
02308 
02309         index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02310         offset = method_unpack_arguments(index);
02311         index = method_unpack_index(index);
02312         locals = sp -offset;
02313         ref = *((uintptr_t *) locals);
02314 
02315         if (ref == JNULL) {
02316             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02317         }
02318 
02319         new_cl = header_get_class((header_t *) ref); // Fetch the new class
02320 
02321         // Lookup the new method in the interface table
02322         low = 0;
02323         high = new_cl->itable_count;
02324 
02325         while (high >= low) {
02326             mid = (low + high) >> 1;
02327             match = new_cl->inames[mid];
02328 
02329             if (index == match) {
02330                 break;
02331             } if (index > match) {
02332                 low = mid + 1;
02333             } else {
02334                 high = mid - 1;
02335             }
02336         }
02337 
02338         new_method = new_cl->itable[mid];
02339         print_method_call(thread, new_method);
02340 
02341         // Check if we are not overflowing the stack
02342         if ((locals + new_method->max_locals + new_method->max_stack)
02343             > (jword_t *) (fp - 1))
02344         {
02345             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
02346                     "Stack overflow, try using a larger stack with the "
02347                     "--stack-size parameter");
02348         }
02349 
02350         // Push a new stack frame
02351         fp->pc = pc + 3;
02352         fp--;
02353         fp->cl = new_cl;
02354         fp->method = new_method;
02355         fp->locals = locals;
02356 
02357         // Install the new state in the local variables
02358         cp = new_method->cp->data;
02359         sp = locals + new_method->max_locals;
02360         pc = new_method->code;
02361         DISPATCH;
02362     }
02363 
02364     OPCODE(INVOKESUPER) {
02365         uint16_t offset, index;
02366         uintptr_t ref;
02367         class_t *new_cl;
02368         method_t *new_method;
02369 
02370         index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02371         offset = method_unpack_arguments(index);
02372         index = method_unpack_index(index);
02373         locals = sp - offset;
02374         ref = *((uintptr_t *) locals);
02375 
02376         if (ref == JNULL) {
02377             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02378         }
02379 
02380         /* Fetch the the new method from the current class' parent dispatch
02381          * table */
02382         new_cl = fp->cl->parent;
02383         new_method = new_cl->dtable[index];
02384 
02385         print_method_call(thread, new_method);
02386 
02387         // Check if we are not overflowing the stack
02388         if ((locals + new_method->max_locals + new_method->max_stack)
02389             > (jword_t *) (fp - 1))
02390         {
02391             c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
02392                     "Stack overflow, try using a larger stack with the "
02393                     "--stack-size parameter");
02394         }
02395 
02396         // Push a new stack frame
02397         fp->pc = pc + 3;
02398         fp--;
02399         fp->cl = new_cl;
02400         fp->method = new_method;
02401         fp->locals = locals;
02402 
02403         // Install the new state in the local variables
02404         cp = new_method->cp->data;
02405         sp = locals + new_method->max_locals;
02406         pc = new_method->code;
02407         DISPATCH;
02408 
02409     }
02410 
02411     OPCODE(NEW) {
02412         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02413         class_t *cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
02414 
02415         SAVE_STATE;
02416         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = gc_new(cl);
02417         sp++;
02418         pc += 3;
02419         DISPATCH;
02420     }
02421 
02422     OPCODE(NEWARRAY) {
02423         int32_t count = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02424         uint8_t type = *(pc + 1);
02425 
02426         if (count < 0) {
02427             goto throw_negativearraysizeexception;
02428         }
02429 
02430         SAVE_STATE;
02431         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1)) = gc_new_array_nonref(type, count);
02432         pc += 2;
02433         DISPATCH;
02434     }
02435 
02436     OPCODE(ANEWARRAY) {
02437         class_t *cl;
02438         int32_t count = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02439         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02440 
02441         SAVE_STATE;
02442         cl = bcl_get_class_by_id(index);
02443 
02444         if (count < 0) {
02445             goto throw_negativearraysizeexception;
02446         }
02447 
02448         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1)) = gc_new_array_ref(cl, count);
02449         pc += 3;
02450         DISPATCH;
02451     }
02452 
02453     OPCODE(ARRAYLENGTH) {
02454         array_t *array = (array_t *) *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02455 
02456         if (array == NULL) {
02457             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02458         }
02459 
02460         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = array_length(array);
02461         pc++;
02462         DISPATCH;
02463     }
02464 
02465     OPCODE(ATHROW) {
02466         uintptr_t exception_ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02467 
02468         if (exception_ref == JNULL) {
02469             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02470         }
02471 
02472         thread->exception = exception_ref;
02473         /* Do not update the pc, the current pc must be preserved so
02474          * that the exception handler can inspect it */
02475         goto exception_handler;
02476     }
02477 
02478     OPCODE(CHECKCAST) {
02479         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02480         class_t *src;
02481         class_t *dest = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
02482         header_t *header;
02483         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02484 
02485         if (ref != JNULL) {
02486             header = (header_t *) ref;
02487             src = header_get_class(header);
02488 
02489             if (src == dest) {
02490                 ; // Shortcut
02491             } else if (!bcl_is_assignable(src, dest)) {
02492                 goto throw_classcastexception;
02493             }
02494         }
02495 
02496         pc += 3;
02497         DISPATCH;
02498     }
02499 
02500     OPCODE(INSTANCEOF) {
02501         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02502         class_t *src;
02503         class_t *dest = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
02504         header_t *header;
02505         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02506 
02507         if (ref == JNULL) {
02508             *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = 0;
02509         } else {
02510             header = (header_t *) ref;
02511             src = header_get_class(header);
02512 
02513             if ((src == dest) || bcl_is_assignable(src, dest)) {
02514                 *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = 1;
02515             } else {
02516                 *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = 0;
02517             }
02518         }
02519 
02520         pc += 3;
02521         DISPATCH;
02522     }
02523 
02524     OPCODE(MONITORENTER) {
02525         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02526 
02527         if (ref == JNULL) {
02528             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02529         }
02530 
02531         SAVE_STATE;
02532         monitor_enter(thread, ref);
02533 
02534         sp--;
02535         pc++;
02536         DISPATCH;
02537     }
02538 
02539     OPCODE(MONITOREXIT) {
02540         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02541 
02542         if (ref == JNULL) {
02543             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02544         }
02545 
02546         SAVE_STATE;
02547 
02548         if (!monitor_exit(thread, ref)) {
02549             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
02550         }
02551 
02552         sp--;
02553         pc++;
02554         DISPATCH;
02555     }
02556 
02557     OPCODE(WIDE) {
02558         uint16_t index;
02559 
02560         switch (*(pc + 1)) {
02561             case ILOAD:
02562                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02563                 *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int32_t *) (locals + index));
02564                 sp++;
02565                 pc += 4;
02566                 DISPATCH;
02567 
02568 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02569 
02570             case FLOAD:
02571                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02572                 *((float *) sp) = *((float *) (locals + index));
02573                 sp++;
02574                 pc += 4;
02575                 DISPATCH;
02576 
02577 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02578 
02579             case ALOAD:
02580                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02581                 *((uintptr_t *) sp) = *((uintptr_t *) (locals + index));
02582                 sp++;
02583                 pc += 4;
02584                 DISPATCH;
02585 
02586             case LLOAD:
02587                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02588                 *((int64_t *) sp) = *((int64_t *) (locals + index));
02589                 sp += 2;
02590                 pc += 4;
02591                 DISPATCH;
02592 
02593 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02594 
02595             case DLOAD:
02596                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02597                 *((double *) sp) = *((double *) (locals + index));
02598                 sp += 2;
02599                 pc += 4;
02600                 DISPATCH;
02601 
02602 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02603 
02604             case ISTORE:
02605                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02606                 *((int32_t *) (locals + index)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02607                 sp--;
02608                 pc += 4;
02609                 DISPATCH;
02610 
02611 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02612 
02613             case FSTORE:
02614                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02615                 *((float *) (locals + index)) = *((float *) (sp - 1));
02616                 sp--;
02617                 pc += 4;
02618                 DISPATCH;
02619 
02620 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02621 
02622             case ASTORE:
02623                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02624                 *((uintptr_t *) (locals + index)) = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02625                 sp--;
02626                 pc += 4;
02627                 DISPATCH;
02628 
02629             case LSTORE:
02630                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02631                 *((int64_t *) (locals + index)) = *((int64_t *) (sp - 2));
02632                 sp -= 2;
02633                 pc += 4;
02634                 DISPATCH;
02635 
02636 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02637 
02638             case DSTORE:
02639                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02640                 *((double *) (locals + index)) = *((double *) (sp - 2));
02641                 sp -= 2;
02642                 pc += 4;
02643                 DISPATCH;
02644 
02645 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02646 
02647             case IINC:
02648                 index = load_uint16_un(pc + 2);
02649                 *((int32_t *) (locals + index)) +=
02650                     (int32_t) load_int16_un(pc + 4);
02651                 pc += 6;
02652                 DISPATCH;
02653 
02654             case METHOD_LOAD:
02655                 /* A recursive call to the interpreter may happen inside the
02656                  * bcl_link_method() call */
02657                 SAVE_STATE;
02658                 bcl_link_method(cp_get_class(fp->method->cp), fp->method);
02659 
02660                 if (thread->exception != JNULL) {
02661                     goto exception_handler;
02662                 }
02663 
02664                 pc = fp->method->code;
02665                 DISPATCH;
02666 
02667             case METHOD_ABSTRACT:
02668                 c_throw(JAVA_LANG_VIRTUALMACHINEERROR,
02669                         "An abstract method was called");
02670                 DISPATCH;
02671 
02672             case INVOKE_NATIVE:
02673             {
02674                 method_t *native = fp->method;
02675                 uintptr_t ref = JNULL;
02676                 bool sync = method_is_synchronized(native);
02677                 bool stat = method_is_static(native);
02678                 native_proto_t func = native->data.function;
02679 
02680                 SAVE_STATE;
02681 
02682                 if (sync) {
02683                     if (stat) {
02684                         ref = class_get_object(fp->cl);
02685                     } else {
02686                         ref = *((uintptr_t *) locals);
02687                     }
02688 
02689                     monitor_enter(thread, ref);
02690                 }
02691 
02692                 /* HACK: Adjust the locals pointer because KNI indexes the
02693                  * arguments from 1 but static methods do not have an implicit
02694                  * argument */
02695                 if (stat) {
02696                     fp->locals--;
02697                 }
02698 
02699                 switch (native->return_type) {
02700                     case RET_VOID:
02701                         func();
02702                         sp = locals;
02703                         break;
02704 
02705                     case RET_INT:
02706                         *((int32_t *) locals) = ((int32_t (*)( void )) func)();
02707                         sp = locals + 1;
02708                         break;
02709 
02710                     case RET_LONG:
02711                         *((int64_t *) locals) = ((int64_t (*)( void )) func)();
02712                         sp = locals + 2;
02713                         break;
02714 
02715                     case RET_OBJECT:
02716                         *((uintptr_t *) locals) =
02717                             ((uintptr_t (*)( void )) func)();
02718                         sp = locals + 1;
02719                         break;
02720 
02721 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02722 
02723                     case RET_FLOAT:
02724                         *((float *) locals) = ((float (*)( void )) func)();
02725                         sp = locals + 1;
02726                         break;
02727 
02728                     case RET_DOUBLE:
02729                         *((double *) locals) = ((double (*)( void )) func)();
02730                         sp = locals + 2;
02731                         break;
02732 
02733 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02734 
02735                     default: dbg_unreachable();
02736                 }
02737 
02738                 // HACK: Readjust the locals, see above
02739                 if (stat) {
02740                     fp->locals++;
02741                 }
02742 
02743                 // Release the monitor if this method was synchronized
02744                 if (sync) {
02745                     if (!monitor_exit(thread, ref)) {
02746                         /* The monitor realease failed the
02747                          * IllegalMonitorStateException overrides any other
02748                          * exceptions which might have been thrown */
02749                         goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
02750                     }
02751                 }
02752 
02753                 // Check if an exception has been thrown
02754                 if (thread->exception != JNULL) {
02755                     print_method_unwind(thread, native);
02756                     goto exception_handler;
02757                 } else {
02758                     print_method_ret(thread, native);
02759 
02760                     // Pop the current frame
02761                     fp++;
02762                     cp = fp->method->cp->data;
02763                     pc = fp->pc;
02764                     locals = fp->locals;
02765 
02766                     // The return value has already been pushed on the stack
02767                     DISPATCH;
02768                 }
02769             }
02770 
02771             case HALT:
02772                 /* If the method terminates abruptly the 'exception' field of
02773                  * the thread structure will point to the uncaught exception.
02774                  * We also destroy the current stack frame as it is fake. */
02775                 thread->fp = fp + 1;
02776                 return;
02777 
02778             default:
02779                 dbg_unreachable();
02780         }
02781     }
02782 
02783     OPCODE(MULTIANEWARRAY) {
02784         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02785         class_t *cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
02786         uintptr_t ref;
02787         uint8_t dimensions = *(pc + 3);
02788 
02789         SAVE_STATE;
02790         ref = gc_new_multiarray(cl, dimensions, sp - dimensions);
02791         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - dimensions)) = ref;
02792         sp = sp - dimensions + 1;
02793         pc += 4;
02794         DISPATCH;
02795     }
02796 
02797     OPCODE(IFNULL) {
02798         uintptr_t ref = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02799         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
02800 
02801         sp--;
02802         pc += (ref == JNULL) ? offset : 3;
02803         DISPATCH;
02804     }
02805 
02806     OPCODE(IFNONNULL) {
02807         uintptr_t ref = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02808         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
02809 
02810         sp--;
02811         pc += (ref != JNULL) ? offset : 3;
02812         DISPATCH;
02813     }
02814 
02815     OPCODE(GOTO_W) {
02816         int32_t offset = load_int32_un(pc + 1);
02817 
02818         pc += offset;
02819         DISPATCH;
02820     }
02821 
02822     // OPCODE(GETSTATIC_BOOL)
02823     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_BYTE) {
02824         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02825 
02826         /* We sign extend, though this shouldn't be done on booleans it does
02827          * no harm */
02828         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int8_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02829         sp++;
02830         pc += 3;
02831         DISPATCH;
02832     }
02833 
02834     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_CHAR) {
02835         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02836 
02837         // No sign extension, Java chars are unsigned
02838         *((uint32_t *) sp) = *((uint16_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02839         sp++;
02840         pc += 3;
02841         DISPATCH;
02842     }
02843 
02844     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_SHORT) {
02845         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02846 
02847         // Sign extension for shorts is needed
02848         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int16_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02849         sp++;
02850         pc += 3;
02851         DISPATCH;
02852     }
02853 
02854     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_INT) {
02855         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02856 
02857         *((int32_t *) sp) = *((int32_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02858         sp++;
02859         pc += 3;
02860         DISPATCH;
02861     }
02862 
02863 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02864 
02865     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_FLOAT) {
02866         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02867 
02868         *((float *) sp) = *((float *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02869         sp++;
02870         pc += 3;
02871         DISPATCH;
02872     }
02873 
02874 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02875 
02876     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_LONG) {
02877         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02878 
02879         *((int64_t *) sp) = *((int64_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02880         sp += 2;
02881         pc += 3;
02882         DISPATCH;
02883     }
02884 
02885 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02886     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_DOUBLE) {
02887         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02888 
02889         *((double *) sp) = *((double *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02890         sp += 2;
02891         pc += 3;
02892         DISPATCH;
02893     }
02894 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02895 
02896     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_REFERENCE) {
02897         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02898 
02899         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = *((uintptr_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index));
02900         sp++;
02901         pc += 3;
02902         DISPATCH;
02903     }
02904 
02905     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_BYTE) {
02906         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02907 
02908         *((int8_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02909         sp--;
02910         pc += 3;
02911         DISPATCH;
02912     }
02913 
02914     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_BOOL) {
02915         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02916 
02917         *((uint8_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) =
02918             *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) & 0x1;
02919         sp--;
02920         pc += 3;
02921         DISPATCH;
02922     }
02923 
02924     // OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_SHORT)
02925     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_CHAR) {
02926         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02927 
02928         *((uint16_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02929         sp--;
02930         pc += 3;
02931         DISPATCH;
02932     }
02933 
02934     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_INT) {
02935         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02936 
02937         *((int32_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
02938         sp--;
02939         pc += 3;
02940         DISPATCH;
02941     }
02942 
02943 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02944 
02945     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_FLOAT) {
02946         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02947 
02948         *((float *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((float *) (sp - 1));
02949         sp--;
02950         pc += 3;
02951         DISPATCH;
02952     }
02953 
02954 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02955 
02956     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_LONG) {
02957         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02958 
02959         *((int64_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((int64_t *) (sp - 2));
02960         sp -= 2;
02961         pc += 3;
02962         DISPATCH;
02963     }
02964 
02965 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02966 
02967     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_DOUBLE) {
02968         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02969 
02970         *((double *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((double *) (sp - 2));
02971         sp -= 2;
02972         pc += 3;
02973         DISPATCH;

02975 
02976 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
02977 
02978     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_REFERENCE) {
02979         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
02980 
02981         *((uintptr_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index)) = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02982         sp--;
02983         pc += 3;
02984         DISPATCH;
02985     }
02986 
02987     OPCODE(GETFIELD_BYTE) {
02988         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
02989         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
02990 
02991         if (ref == JNULL) {
02992             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
02993         }
02994 
02995         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = *((int8_t *) (ref + offset));
02996         pc += 3;
02997         DISPATCH;
02998     }
02999 
03000     OPCODE(GETFIELD_BOOL) {
03001         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03002         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03003 
03004         if (ref == JNULL) {
03005             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03006         }
03007 
03008         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) =
03009             (*((uint8_t *) (ref + (offset >> 3))) >> (offset & 0x7)) & 0x1;
03010         pc += 3;
03011         DISPATCH;
03012     }
03013 
03014     OPCODE(GETFIELD_CHAR) {
03015         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03016         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03017 
03018         if (ref == JNULL) {
03019             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03020         }
03021 
03022         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = *((uint16_t *) (ref + offset));
03023         pc += 3;
03024         DISPATCH;
03025     }
03026 
03027     OPCODE(GETFIELD_SHORT) {
03028         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03029         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03030 
03031         if (ref == JNULL) {
03032             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03033         }
03034 
03035         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = *((int16_t *) (ref + offset));
03036         pc += 3;
03037         DISPATCH;
03038     }
03039 
03040     OPCODE(GETFIELD_INT) {
03041         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03042         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03043 
03044         if (ref == JNULL) {
03045             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03046         }
03047 
03048         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = *((int32_t *) (ref + offset));
03049         pc += 3;
03050         DISPATCH;
03051     }
03052 
03053 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03054 
03055     OPCODE(GETFIELD_FLOAT) {
03056         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03057         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03058 
03059         if (ref == JNULL) {
03060             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03061         }
03062 
03063         *((float *) (sp - 1)) = *((float *) (ref + offset));
03064         pc += 3;
03065         DISPATCH;
03066     }
03067 
03068 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03069 
03070     OPCODE(GETFIELD_LONG) {
03071         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03072         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03073 
03074         if (ref == JNULL) {
03075             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03076         }
03077 
03078         *((int64_t *) (sp - 1)) = *((int64_t *) (ref + offset));
03079         sp++;
03080         pc += 3;
03081         DISPATCH;
03082     }
03083 
03084 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03085 
03086     OPCODE(GETFIELD_DOUBLE) {
03087         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03088         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03089 
03090         if (ref == JNULL) {
03091             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03092         }
03093 
03094         *((double *) (sp - 1)) = *((double *) (ref + offset));
03095         sp++;
03096         pc += 3;
03097         DISPATCH;

03100 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03101 
03102     OPCODE(GETFIELD_REFERENCE) {
03103         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03104         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03105 
03106         if (ref == JNULL) {
03107             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03108         }
03109 
03110         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1)) = *((uintptr_t *) (ref + offset));
03111         pc += 3;
03112         DISPATCH;
03113     }
03114 
03115     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_BYTE) {
03116         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
03117         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03118 
03119         if (ref == JNULL) {
03120             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03121         }
03122 
03123         *((int8_t *) (ref + offset)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
03124         sp -= 2;
03125         pc += 3;
03126         DISPATCH;
03127     }
03128 
03129     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_BOOL) {
03130         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
03131         uint32_t value;
03132         uint32_t nvalue;
03133         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03134 
03135         if (ref == JNULL) {
03136             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03137         }
03138 
03139         value = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) & 0x1;
03140         nvalue = value ^ 0x1;
03141         *((uint8_t *) (ref + (offset >> 3))) |= (value << (offset & 0x7));
03142         *((uint8_t *) (ref + (offset >> 3))) &= ~(nvalue << (offset & 0x7));
03143         sp -= 2;
03144         pc += 3;
03145         DISPATCH;
03146     }
03147 
03148     // OPCODE(PUTFIELD_SHORT)
03149     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_CHAR) {
03150         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
03151         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03152 
03153         if (ref == JNULL) {
03154             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03155         }
03156 
03157         *((int16_t *) (ref + offset)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
03158         sp -= 2;
03159         pc += 3;
03160         DISPATCH;
03161     }
03162 
03163     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_INT) {
03164         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
03165         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03166 
03167         if (ref == JNULL) {
03168             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03169         }
03170 
03171         *((int32_t *) (ref + offset)) = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
03172         sp -= 2;
03173         pc += 3;
03174         DISPATCH;
03175     }
03176 
03177 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03178 
03179     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_FLOAT) {
03180         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
03181         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03182 
03183         if (ref == JNULL) {
03184             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03185         }
03186 
03187         *((float *) (ref + offset)) = *((float *) (sp - 1));
03188         sp -= 2;
03189         pc += 3;
03190         DISPATCH;
03191     }
03192 
03193 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03194 
03195     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_LONG) {
03196         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 3));
03197         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03198 
03199         if (ref == JNULL) {
03200             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03201         }
03202 
03203         *((int64_t *) (ref + offset)) = *((int64_t *) (sp - 2));
03204         sp -= 3;
03205         pc += 3;
03206         DISPATCH;
03207     }
03208 
03209 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03210 
03211     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_DOUBLE) {
03212         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 3));
03213         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03214 
03215         if (ref == JNULL) {
03216             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03217         }
03218 
03219         *((double *) (ref + offset)) = *((double *) (sp - 2));
03220         sp -= 3;
03221         pc += 3;
03222         DISPATCH;
03223     }
03224 
03225 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03226 
03227     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_REFERENCE) {
03228         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 2));
03229         int16_t offset = load_int16_un(pc + 1);
03230 
03231         if (ref == JNULL) {
03232             goto throw_nullpointerexception;
03233         }
03234 
03235         *((uintptr_t *) (ref + offset)) = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03236         sp -= 2;
03237         pc += 3;
03238         DISPATCH;
03239     }
03240 
03241     OPCODE(GETFIELD_PRELINK)
03242     OPCODE(PUTFIELD_PRELINK)
03243     OPCODE(INVOKEVIRTUAL_PRELINK)
03244     OPCODE(INVOKESPECIAL_PRELINK)
03245     OPCODE(INVOKEINTERFACE_PRELINK)
03246     OPCODE(NEWARRAY_PRELINK)
03247     OPCODE(ANEWARRAY_PRELINK)
03248     OPCODE(CHECKCAST_PRELINK)
03249     OPCODE(INSTANCEOF_PRELINK)
03250     OPCODE(MULTIANEWARRAY_PRELINK)
03251     OPCODE(LDC_PRELINK)
03252     OPCODE(LDC_W_PRELINK)
03253         SAVE_STATE;
03254         pc = bcl_link_opcode(fp->method, pc, *pc);
03255         // Note that the current instruction will be replayed
03256         DISPATCH;
03257 
03258     OPCODE(GETSTATIC_PRELINK)
03259     OPCODE(PUTSTATIC_PRELINK)
03260     OPCODE(INVOKESTATIC_PRELINK)
03261     OPCODE(NEW_PRELINK)
03262         /* A recursive call to the interpreter may happen inside the
03263          * bcl_link_opcode() call */
03264         SAVE_STATE;
03265         pc = bcl_link_opcode(fp->method, pc, *pc);
03266 
03267         if (thread->exception != JNULL) {
03268             goto exception_handler;
03269         }
03270 
03271         // Note that the current instruction will be replayed
03272         DISPATCH;
03273 
03274     OPCODE(MONITORENTER_SPECIAL) {
03275         uintptr_t ref = *((uintptr_t *) locals);
03276 
03277         SAVE_STATE;
03278         monitor_enter(thread, ref);
03279         pc++;
03280         DISPATCH;
03281     }
03282 
03283     OPCODE(MONITORENTER_SPECIAL_STATIC) {
03284         class_t *cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03285         uintptr_t ref = class_get_object(cl);
03286 
03287         SAVE_STATE;
03288         monitor_enter(thread, ref);
03289         pc++;
03290         DISPATCH;
03291     }
03292 
03293     OPCODE(IRETURN_MONITOREXIT) {
03294         bool res;
03295         int32_t ret_value;
03296 
03297         SAVE_STATE;
03298         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
03299 
03300         if (method_is_static(fp->method)) {
03301             uintptr_t cl_ref;
03302             class_t *cl;
03303 
03304             cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03305             cl_ref = class_get_object(cl);
03306             res = monitor_exit(thread, cl_ref);
03307         } else {
03308             res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) locals));
03309         }
03310 
03311         if (!res) {
03312             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03313         }
03314 
03315         // Pop the return value
03316         ret_value = *((int32_t *) (sp - 1));
03317 
03318         // Pop the current frame
03319         sp = locals + 1;
03320         fp++;
03321         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03322         pc = fp->pc;
03323         locals = fp->locals;
03324 
03325         // Push the return value on the stack
03326         *((int32_t *) (sp - 1)) = ret_value;
03327         DISPATCH;
03328     }
03329 
03330     OPCODE(LRETURN_MONITOREXIT) {
03331         bool res;
03332         int64_t ret_value;
03333 
03334         SAVE_STATE;
03335         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
03336 
03337         if (method_is_static(fp->method)) {
03338             uintptr_t cl_ref;
03339             class_t *cl;
03340 
03341             cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03342             cl_ref = class_get_object(cl);
03343             res = monitor_exit(thread, cl_ref);
03344         } else {
03345             res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) locals));
03346         }
03347 
03348         if (!res) {
03349             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03350         }
03351 
03352         // Pop the return value
03353         ret_value = *((int64_t *) (sp - 2));
03354 
03355         // Pop the current frame
03356         sp = locals + 2;
03357         fp++;
03358         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03359         pc = fp->pc;
03360         locals = fp->locals;
03361 
03362         // Push the return value on the stack
03363         *((int64_t *) (sp - 2)) = ret_value;
03364         DISPATCH;
03365     }
03366 
03367 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03368 
03369     OPCODE(FRETURN_MONITOREXIT) {
03370         bool res;
03371         float ret_value;
03372 
03373         SAVE_STATE;
03374         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
03375 
03376         if (method_is_static(fp->method)) {
03377             uintptr_t cl_ref;
03378             class_t *cl;
03379 
03380             cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03381             cl_ref = class_get_object(cl);
03382             res = monitor_exit(thread, cl_ref);
03383         } else {
03384             res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) locals));
03385         }
03386 
03387         if (!res) {
03388             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03389         }
03390 
03391         // Pop the return value
03392         ret_value = *((float *) (sp - 1));
03393 
03394         // Pop the current frame
03395         sp = locals + 1;
03396         fp++;
03397         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03398         pc = fp->pc;
03399         locals = fp->locals;
03400 
03401         // Push the return value on the stack
03402         *((float *) (sp - 1)) = ret_value;
03403         DISPATCH;
03404     }
03405 
03406     OPCODE(DRETURN_MONITOREXIT) {
03407         bool res;
03408         double ret_value;
03409 
03410         SAVE_STATE;
03411         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
03412 
03413         if (method_is_static(fp->method)) {
03414             uintptr_t cl_ref;
03415             class_t *cl;
03416 
03417             cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03418             cl_ref = class_get_object(cl);
03419             res = monitor_exit(thread, cl_ref);
03420         } else {
03421             res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) locals));
03422         }
03423 
03424         if (!res) {
03425             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03426         }
03427 
03428         // Pop the return value
03429         ret_value = *((double *) (sp - 2));
03430 
03431         // Pop the current frame
03432         sp = locals + 2;
03433         fp++;
03434         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03435         pc = fp->pc;
03436         locals = fp->locals;
03437 
03438         // Push the return value on the stack
03439         *((double *) (sp - 2)) = ret_value;
03440         DISPATCH;
03441     }
03442 
03443 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
03444 
03445     OPCODE(ARETURN_MONITOREXIT) {
03446         bool res;
03447         uintptr_t ret_value;
03448 
03449         SAVE_STATE;
03450         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
03451 
03452         if (method_is_static(fp->method)) {
03453             uintptr_t cl_ref;
03454             class_t *cl;
03455 
03456             cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03457             cl_ref = class_get_object(cl);
03458             res = monitor_exit(thread, cl_ref);
03459         } else {
03460             res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) locals));
03461         }
03462 
03463         if (!res) {
03464             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03465         }
03466 
03467         // Pop the return value
03468         ret_value = *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1));
03469 
03470         // Pop the current frame
03471         sp = locals + 1;
03472         fp++;
03473         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03474         pc = fp->pc;
03475         locals = fp->locals;
03476 
03477         // Push the return value on the stack
03478         *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1)) = ret_value;
03479         DISPATCH;
03480     }
03481 
03482     OPCODE(RETURN_MONITOREXIT) {
03483         bool res;
03484 
03485         SAVE_STATE;
03486         print_method_ret(thread, fp->method);
03487 
03488         if (method_is_static(fp->method)) {
03489             uintptr_t cl_ref;
03490             class_t *cl;
03491 
03492             cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, 0);
03493             cl_ref = class_get_object(cl);
03494             res = monitor_exit(thread, cl_ref);
03495         } else {
03496             res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) locals));
03497         }
03498 
03499         if (!res) {
03500             goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03501         }
03502 
03503         // Pop the current frame
03504         sp = locals;
03505         fp++;
03506         cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03507         pc = fp->pc;
03508         locals = fp->locals;
03509 
03510         DISPATCH;
03511     }
03512 
03513 #if JEL_FINALIZER
03514 
03515     OPCODE(NEW_FINALIZER) {
03516         uint16_t index = load_uint16_un(pc + 1);
03517         class_t *cl = (class_t *) cp_data_get_ptr(cp, index);
03518         uintptr_t new_ref;
03519 
03520         SAVE_STATE;
03521         new_ref = gc_new(cl);
03522         gc_register_finalizable(new_ref);
03523 
03524         *((uintptr_t *) sp) = new_ref;
03525         sp++;
03526         pc += 3;
03527         DISPATCH;
03528     }
03529 
03530 #endif // JEL_FINALIZER
03531 
03532     /*
03533      * In the following statements we will re-use the exception field of the
03534      * thread structure to hold an exception index instead of a Java object
03535      * reference. Once we are done with it we immediately set it to JNULL as
03536      * the GC excepts a real Java reference to be held in that field
03537      */
03538 
03539 throw_arithmeticexception:
03540     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/ArithmeticException";
03541     goto throw_exception;
03542 
03543 throw_arrayindexoutofboundsexception:
03544     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException";
03545     goto throw_exception;
03546 
03547 throw_arraystoreexception:
03548     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/ArrayStoreException";
03549     goto throw_exception;
03550 
03551 throw_classcastexception:
03552     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/ClassCastException";
03553     goto throw_exception;
03554 
03555 throw_illegalmonitorstateexception:
03556     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/IllegalMonitorStateException";
03557     goto throw_exception;
03558 
03559 throw_negativearraysizeexception:
03560     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/NegativeArraySizeException";
03561     goto throw_exception;
03562 
03563 throw_nullpointerexception:
03564     thread->exception = (uintptr_t) "java/lang/NullPointerException";
03565     goto throw_exception;
03566 
03567 throw_exception:
03568     {
03569         class_t *cl;
03570         uintptr_t exception_ref;
03571         const char *name = (const char *) thread->exception;
03572 
03573         SAVE_STATE;
03574         thread->exception = JNULL; // Needed because of the GC
03575         cl = bcl_resolve_class(fp->cl, name);
03576 
03577 #if JEL_PRINT
03578         if (opts_get_print_opcodes()) {
03579             printf("Throwing class = %s\n", cl->name);
03580         }
03581 #endif // JEL_PRINT
03582 
03583         // Create the exception and flag the current thread with it
03584         exception_ref = gc_new(cl);
03585         thread->exception = exception_ref;
03586     }
03587 
03588     goto exception_handler;
03589 
03590 exception_handler:
03591     {
03592         class_t *catch_type;
03593         class_t *exception_type;
03594         method_t *method = fp->method;
03595         exception_handler_t *handlers = method->data.handlers;
03596         uintptr_t exception_ref = thread->exception;
03597         uint32_t i;
03598         uint32_t real_pc = pc - method->code;
03599         bool found = false;
03600 
03601         exception_type = header_get_class((header_t *) exception_ref);
03602 
03603         for (i = 0; i < method->exception_table_length; i++) {
03604             if ((real_pc >= handlers[i].start_pc)
03605                 && (real_pc < handlers[i].end_pc))
03606             {
03607                 catch_type = handlers[i].catch_type;
03608 
03609                 if ((exception_type == catch_type)
03610                     || (class_is_parent(catch_type, exception_type)))
03611                 {
03612                     found = true;
03613                     break;
03614                 }
03615             }
03616         }
03617 
03618         if (found) {
03619             /* We found an exception handler, install the new state in the
03620              * local variables and clear the thread exception */
03621             pc = handlers[i].handler_pc;
03622 
03623             if (method != &halt_method) {
03624                 thread->exception = JNULL;
03625             }
03626 
03627             // Adjust the stack and push the exception on top of it
03628             sp = fp->locals + method->max_locals + 1;
03629             *((uintptr_t *) (sp - 1)) = exception_ref;
03630 
03631             // TODO: Create the stack trace
03632             DISPATCH;
03633         } else {
03634             // Abrupt method termination
03635             bool res = true;
03636 
03637             if (method != &halt_method) {
03638                 print_method_unwind(thread, method);
03639             }
03640 
03641             if (method_is_synchronized(method)) {
03642                 if (method_is_static(method)) {
03643                     res = monitor_exit(thread, class_get_object(fp->cl));
03644                 } else {
03645                     res = monitor_exit(thread, *((uintptr_t *) fp->locals));
03646                 }
03647             }
03648 
03649             /* Pop the current frame and substract one from the PC, it won't be
03650              * used directly but this trick is needed for the exception handler
03651              * of the caller method to work */
03652             fp++;
03653             cp = fp->method->cp->data;
03654             pc = fp->pc - 1;
03655             locals = fp->locals;
03656 
03657             if (!res) {
03658                 /* If the monitor exit has failed ignore the current
03659                  * exception and throw an IllegalMonitorStateException
03660                  * instead */
03661                 goto throw_illegalmonitorstateexception;
03662             } else {
03663                 // Look for an appropriate handler in the popped method
03664                 goto exception_handler;
03665             }
03666         }
03667     }
03668 
03669     INTERPRETER_EPILOG
03670 } // interpreter()
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:25 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
